title: ZONE TEAM LEADER
description:
DESCRIPTION

Career Area:

Manufacturing

Job Description:

Your Work Shapes the World at Caterpillar Inc.

When you join Caterpillar, you're joining a global team who cares not just about the work we do – but also about each other. We are the makers, problem solvers, and future world builders who are creating stronger, more sustainable communities. We don't just talk about progress and innovation here – we make it happen, with our customers, where we work and live. Together, we are building a better world, so we can all enjoy living in it.

Job Description:

Role Definition
Performs advanced inspection and audits to track, analyze, and report on materials, processes, and products to ensure conformance to company's quality standards.

Responsibilities

• Responsible for managing a team of Inspectors and Junior Engineers to ensure effective governance of quality gates, IPV, road testing, and PDI processes.
• Analyzing non-conformance data and maintaining quality system documentation.
• Interacting with cross functional team members to determine root cause of quality issues and ensure that corrective and preventive actions are implemented.

• Work in a team environment to develop and implement best practices that emphasize defect prevention, reduction in variation and waste and provide for continuous improvements in meeting all customer requirements.
• Identifying, analyzing, and resolving non-conformance. Investigating problems on worked purchased finished, rough, and interplant material.

• Entrusted with the additional responsibility of managing sound testing compliance for EU‑region machines.
• Coordinates various Quality training programs.

Basic Qualifications

A bachelor’s degree in engineering/manufacturing with an excellent understanding of quality management practices or equivalent experience.

The ability to utilize a variety of computer software packages is also necessary. In addition, Four to Six years of job-related experience are typically required.

Good human relations skills are required to develop a cooperative work relationship with others inside and outside the department

Additional Information

Work Location: Tiruvallur, India

Skill Descriptors
Accuracy and Attention to Detail: Understanding the necessity and value of accuracy; ability to complete tasks with high levels of precision.
Level Basic Understanding:
• Explains the importance of accuracy in own function or unit.
• Identifies tasks or outputs that require accuracy and detail-level attention.
• Identifies the procedures for making sure that results are mistake-free.
• Describes consequences of errors within own unit or function.

Collaborating: Knowledge of collaborative techniques; ability to work with a variety of individuals and groups in a constructive and collaborative manner.
Level Working Knowledge:
• Demonstrates experience participating in productive collaborative processes.
• Under guidance, initiates collaborative meetings.
• Assists in communicating shared goals with diverse groups and parties.
• Helps promote collaboration across generations, functions, regions, and levels.
• Helps solve business problems and meet business goals through collaborative processes.

Decision Making and Critical Thinking: Knowledge of the decision-making process and associated tools and techniques; ability to accurately analyze situations and reach productive decisions based on informed judgment.
Level Basic Understanding:
• Explains characteristics and steps in an effective decision-making process.
• Identifies issues and communicates with others when a decision needs to be made.
• Names decision makers in own environment and cites examples of past decisions.
• Describes types of decisions incumbent may and may not make in own job or function.

Effective Communications: Understanding of effective communication concepts, tools and techniques; ability to effectively transmit, receive, and accurately interpret ideas, information, and needs through the application of appropriate communication behaviors.
Level Basic Understanding:
• Describes non-verbal behaviors’ that influence the interpretation of the message.
• Cites examples of effective and ineffective communications.
• Explains the importance of effective business communication.
• Speaks/writes using correct language, mechanics, and gestures.

Flexibility and Adaptability: Knowledge of successful approaches and techniques for dealing with change; ability to adapt to a changing environment and be comfortable with change.
Level Basic Understanding:
• Explains the perspective that change is inevitable.
• Seeks value in new ways of doing things.
• Easily copes with day-to-day frustrations, adversities and uncertainties.
• Provides examples of flexible and inflexible behaviors in the face of change.

Manufacturing Processes: Knowledge of existing product manufacturing methods, technologies and processes; ability to execute, plan, manage and monitor the entire manufacturing process.
Level Basic Understanding:
• Describes functional areas in a manufacturing facility.
• Describes the roles and responsibilities of manufacturing areas and staff.
• Identifies major phases and activities associated with a manufacturing cycle.
• Obtains and interprets high-level manufacturing flow and documentation.

Problem Solving: Knowledge of approaches, tools, techniques for recognizing, anticipating, and resolving organizational, operational or process problems; ability to apply knowledge of problem solving appropriately to diverse situations.
Level Working Knowledge:
• Identifies and documents specific problems and resolution alternatives.
• Examines a specific problem and understands the perspective of each involved stakeholder.
• Develops alternative techniques for assessing accuracy and relevance of information.
• Helps to analyze risks and benefits of alternative approaches and obtain decision on resolution.
• Uses fact-finding techniques and diagnostic tools to identify problems.

Quality Management System (QMS): Knowledge of Quality Management System's (QMS) functions, features, and capabilities; ability to design, implement, test, and maintain Quality Management Systems to consistently meet customer requirements and regulatory compliances.
Level Basic Understanding:
• Explains the main features, functions, and capabilities of QMS.
• Lists the major market players/vendors of QMS.
• Outlines the benefits of using automated and manual QMS.
• Understands the role of QMS in implementing a formalized system for documenting manufacturing processes and procedures to meet customer requirements and regulatory compliances.

title: MANAGER TRANSPORTATION
description:
DESCRIPTION

Career Area:

Supply Chain and Logistics

Job Description:

Your Work Shapes the World at Caterpillar Inc.

When you join Caterpillar, you're joining a global team who cares not just about the work we do – but also about each other. We are the makers, problem solvers, and future world builders who are creating stronger, more sustainable communities. We don't just talk about progress and innovation here – we make it happen, with our customers, where we work and live. Together, we are building a better world, so we can all enjoy living in it.

JOB DUTIES: Scope, design, operate, day-to-day services and implement transportation service solutions. Coordinate problem resolution with Caterpillar facilities and approved Service Providers with regards to transportation services. Identify, develop and administer the implementation of improved transportation methods that support Caterpillar's cost and service objectives and goals, to ensure best results for Caterpillar. Incumbent identifies, develops, leads and executes the implementation of transportation projects that support Caterpillar's cost and service objectives, to ensure best results for Caterpillar.

Identifies, investigates, and resolves problems with shipments to ensure accurate and on-time delivery to facilities, and develops initiatives to improve service and lower cost. Manages the performance of these Service Providers through Key Performance Indicators to meet cost and service performance expectations from Caterpillar facilities, Suppliers and Distribution Centers. Identifies, analyzes, develops and implements improved transportation methods that support Caterpillar's quality, velocity and cost objectives. Identifies areas of possible cost savings or improvements in service, associated with the contracted Service Providers. Coordinates impact analysis and implementation of cost-effective solutions with Providers. To coordinate and provide expertise for various PSLD Logistics regional and global transportation modeling and management projects to support internal and external Clients.

Accountable for Velocity and visibility of International Inbound & Outbound and Ground Transportation.
Manage Domestic Inbound and Outbound Transportation operations across multiple manufacturing and distribution locations in India.
Ensure on-time delivery, optimized freight flows, and uninterrupted production support through proactive transportation planning and execution. Govern daily transportation activities including load planning, exception management, and service recovery
Lead Control Team responsible for execution, monitoring, issue resolution and performance reporting. Establish clear roles to ensure high-velocity and predictable transportation operations.
Govern Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) such as on-time pickup, on-time delivery, cost per kilogram, transit variability, detention and damages.
Lead carrier performance reviews, corrective action plans and cost-reduction initiatives.
Manage & Control activities related to Customs clearance & Transportation activities for all import / export shipments and related Ground Transportation operations.
Liaisons with Government officials like Customs and Foreign Trade officials to maintain good relationships.
Ensure strict adherence to trade compliance & legal requirements.
Identifies and implements process improvement opportunities, root causes and corrective actions to reduce performance gaps within the transportation network.
Drive BY Transportation Management System (TMS) utilization for planning, execution, freight settlement and analytics. Improve optimizer performance by fine-tuning lanes, rates, constraints and carrier capacities to enable cost-optimal routing decisions.
Leverage BY TMS dashboards and analytics to provide actionable insights to operations and leadership.
Provides analytical insights and reporting to leadership and internal customers to generate fact driven solutions and performance metric reporting.

Required Qualifications:

Bachelors / Master’s in Supply Chain, Logistics stream
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Good interpersonal and communication skills
Minimum of 6 to 8 years of responsible Import / Exports, Ground Transportation job experience
Experience in Supply Chain / Logistics or Transportation Management
Capable of working and communicating with a variety of company (all levels) and Supplier personnel

description:

Job Description:

Your Work Shapes the World at Caterpillar Inc.

We are seeking a passionate and experienced .NET Developer with expertise in Azure, Microsoft Fabric, and data engineering to join our dynamic team. The candidate will be responsible for designing, developing, deploying, and maintaining applications built on the .NET framework, leveraging Microsoft Azure and Microsoft Fabric for scalable, high-performance, and reliable solutions, with a strong focus on data engineering best practices.

Key Responsibilities

· Design, develop, and maintain applications using C#, .NET Core, ASP.NET MVC, Web API.

· Build and deploy cloud-based solutions leveraging Azure App Services, Azure Functions, Azure Logic Apps, Azure SQL, and Azure Storage.

· Develop and optimize data pipelines and data integration solutions using Microsoft Fabric, including Data Factory, Dataflows, and Lakehouse’s.

· Implement robust data engineering solutions for ETL, data modelling, and data warehousing.

· Implement secure authentication and authorization using Azure AD / Identity Server.

· Design and optimize databases with SQL Server / Azure SQL Database.

· Integrate applications with Azure DevOps pipelines (CI/CD) for automated deployments.

· Monitor and troubleshoot application performance using Azure Monitor, Application Insights, and Log Analytics.

· Collaborate with product managers, QA engineers, and other developers in an Agile/Scrum environment.

· Ensure best practices in coding, architecture, security, cloud-native development, and data engineering.

Required Skills & Qualifications

· Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Engineering, or related field.

· 5–8 years of proven experience as a .NET Developer.

· Strong expertise in C#, .NET Core, ASP.NET MVC, Web API.

· Hands-on experience with Microsoft Azure (App Services, Functions, Storage, Azure SQL, Azure AD, Key Vault).

· Practical experience with Microsoft Fabric, including building and managing data pipelines, dataflows, and Lakehouse’s.

· Strong knowledge of data engineering concepts, ETL processes, data modelling, and data warehousing.

· Experience with Azure DevOps (Repos, Pipelines, Boards).

· Strong database knowledge (MS SQL Server, Entity Framework, LINQ).

· Familiarity with RESTful APIs, Microservices architecture, Docker/Kubernetes is a plus.

· Solid understanding of OOP, design patterns, and SOLID principles.

· Excellent problem-solving and communication skills.

Preferred Skills

· Exposure to Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using ARM templates, Terraform, or Bicep.

· Experience with unit testing frameworks (NUnit, xUnit, MSTest).

· Familiarity with security best practices in cloud applications.

· Experience with data analytics, Power BI, or other data visualization tools is a plus.

description:
DESCRIPTION

Career Area:

Supply Chain and Logistics

Job Description:

Your Work Shapes the World at Caterpillar Inc.

We are the makers, problem solvers, and future world builders who are creating stronger, more sustainable communities. Job Summary:

The primary goal is to support the Product Support & Logistics (PSLD) division’s effort in achieving the inventory and customer service objectives. As an Inventory Analyst, you will have responsibility for ensuring the complete and successful testing and conversion planning of all PIC functions in dealers’ ERP conversion projects, and contribute to design, development, and deployment of the new PIC Data Analytics Suite (DAS).

What You Will Do:

Develop automated processes to aid in data cleansing and maintenance using analytical tools (SQL, SAS, Python, PowerBI).
Develop and test new reporting tools, following standards and best practices within the division.
Support 24x7 PIC systems for dealer order recommendations, willing to work in Europe / US time zone.
Performing work to achieve corporate supply chain performance targets focused on inventory reduction, increased inventory turns and improved parts availability.
Working effectively with diverse, multi-functional teams to apply the supply chain logistics process and leading team efforts to develop a lean parts distribution network.

Additional Information:

Bachelor’s degree in engineering / Math’s / Science / Commerce.
2 to 3 years’ relevant experience in data analytics and visualization tools.

What You Have

Analytical Thinking: Knowledge of techniques and tools that promote effective analysis; ability to determine the root cause of organizational problems and create alternative solutions that resolve these problems.

• Names specific tools or techniques that can be used to support the analytical thinking process.

• Locates internal and external informative sources or proprietary materials about capacity planning & management.

Problem Solving: Knowledge of approaches, tools, techniques for recognizing, anticipating, and resolving organizational, operational or process problems; ability to apply knowledge of problem solving appropriately to diverse situations.

• Identifies and documents specific problems and resolution alternatives.

• Develops alternative techniques for assessing accuracy and relevance of information.
• Helps to analyze risks and benefits of alternative approaches and obtain decision on resolution.

title: MANUFACTURING ENGINEER - ENGINE ASSEMBLY & DIGITAL MANUFACTURING
description:
DESCRIPTION

Career Area:

Manufacturing

Job Description:

Your Work Shapes the World at Caterpillar Inc.

When you join Caterpillar, you're joining a global team who cares not just about the work we do – but also about each other. We are the makers, problem solvers, and future world builders who are creating stronger, more sustainable communities. We don't just talk about progress and innovation here – we make it happen, with our customers, where we work and live. Together, we are building a better world, so we can all enjoy living in it.

JOB Description – Manufacturing Engineer – Engine Assembly & Digital Manufacturing

Caterpillar Inc is the world’s leading manufacturer of off-highway machinery and diesel and natural gas engines. The Caterpillar brand is recognized worldwide and is synonymous with quality and reliability.

The Industrial Power Systems Division currently has a new and exciting opportunity for a Manufacturing Engineer. This position works both independently and as part of a team to maintain and improve processes and systems used in manufacturing. In addition, Manufacturing Engineers function as a specialist and subject matter expert for technical planning throughout a manufacturing facility. As Manufacturing Engineer, you will have an opportunity to provide the technical expertise necessary to design, develop, and implement manufacturing systems, manufacturing operations and state of the art machines.

JOB PURPOSE: To provide expertise in specific areas of the manufacturing process to ensure the most efficient and cost-effective manufacture of product.

Job Duties/Responsibilities may include, but are not limited to:

Technical Specialist Role in Manufacturing Engineering

The staff position is designed to operate as a specialist within a distinct technical phase of the manufacturing engineering function. This role typically encompasses a broad spectrum of major areas such as releasing processes, engine assembly, testing procedures, paint processing, assembly workflows, facility layout, establishment of work standards, and ongoing manufacturing development. As a specialist, the incumbent is expected to possess deep expertise and provide guidance in these critical domains to ensure efficient and effective manufacturing operations.

Project Coordination and Evaluation

Work assignments undertaken by incumbents in this role may vary in scope, ranging from highly specialized tasks to broader projects that require coordination and collaboration with other staff members. This collaborative approach ensures that larger projects are completed effectively and efficiently by integrating the expertise of various personnel.

PROJECT EVALUATION AND LOGICAL PLANNING

Incumbents are responsible for evaluating projects to clearly define the desired outcomes. This process involves determining the most logical and practical approaches to achieve these results, taking into account all relevant aspects of the project.

ASSESSMENT OF REQUIREMENTS

As part of the project evaluation, various factors are assessed including cost, annual personnel requirements, equipment, available space, and other pertinent information. This comprehensive analysis is essential to accurately determine the overall requirements necessary for successful project execution.

FEASIBILITY STUDIES AND RECOMMENDATIONS

Feasibility studies are prepared to evaluate the appropriateness and cost-effectiveness of proposed initiatives. Based on these studies, recommendations are submitted to guide decision-making and ensure that project objectives are met in a manner that optimizes resources and delivers value.

Results contribute to the effective management decisions in determining the most efficient processes, methods, machinery, tools, equipment, services and systems needed in the manufacture of product.

Adheres to established standards, policies and practices relating to quality, cost reduction, safety, ergonomics, etc. in performing assigned duties.

IMPACT ON MANUFACTURING DECISIONS AND STANDARDS COMPLIANCE

The outcomes produced by the technical specialist play a pivotal role in guiding management towards informed decision-making. These results assist in identifying and selecting the most efficient processes, methodologies, machinery, tools, equipment, services, and systems required for manufacturing products. By facilitating the evaluation and optimization of these elements, the specialist ensures that production is carried out in a manner that enhances operational efficiency and effectiveness.

In addition to supporting management decisions, the specialist consistently follows established standards, policies, and practices in all assigned duties. This adherence encompasses aspects such as quality assurance, cost reduction, safety protocols, and ergonomic considerations. By maintaining compliance with these guidelines, the specialist contributes to a safe, efficient, and cost-effective manufacturing environment, while also upholding the organization's commitment to high-quality production.

You will act as a technical specialist and change leader, driving:

New Product Introduction (NPI)
Digital Manufacturing, AI & Industry 4.0 initiatives
Lean transformation and productivity improvements
Advanced tooling, automation, and smart factory solutions

👉 THIS IS A HIGH-OWNERSHIP ROLE REQUIRING BOTH HANDS-ON ENGINEERING DEPTH AND STRATEGIC THINKING.

Digital Manufacturing, AI & Analytics Expectations:

Develop and deploy data-driven manufacturing systems leveraging MES, IIoT, and enterprise data platforms
Design and implement interactive dashboards and reports using Microsoft Power BI to monitor:
OEE, cycle time, downtime, and bottlenecks
First-pass yield, defect trends, and rework
Tool performance (torque tools, leak testers, etc.)
Enable real-time shopfloor visibility through integrated data pipelines (MES + IoT + ERP)
Drive advanced analytics and AI/ML initiatives, such as:
Predictive maintenance for critical equipment
Quality prediction using process parameters
Torque signature and leak test data analytics
Production optimization and line balancing
Translate data insights into actionable improvements on the shopfloor (closed-loop problem solving)

AI / ML & IIoT Expectations:

Identify and implement AI/ML use cases aligned with manufacturing KPIs (cost, quality, delivery)
Work with cross-functional teams (IT/Data/Operations) to:
Build data models
Validate insights
Deploy scalable solutions
Implement IIoT-based connectivity for machines, tools, and testing equipment
Enable data acquisition, cleansing, and standardization for analytics readiness

ACTUAL WORK ASSIGNMENTS MAY BE TYPIFIED AS FOLLOWS:
Oversee the projection, assessment, specification, and procurement of new or replacement machine tools.
Offer engineering consultation on manufacturing processes, tooling and gauging requirements, and conduct detailed cost and delivery analyses.
Specialize in designing fixtures for assembly, pressing, work holding, and developing specialized machining and assembly tools.
Develop and execute cost reduction initiatives aligned with Lean Manufacturing principles.
Provide accurate estimates for design, processing, manufacturing, and inspection hours required for tooling components to support all aspects of final product delivery.
Utilize computer-aided design and engineering software to fulfill job functions efficiently.
Demonstrate expertise in materials selection for tools used in engine assembly, including jigs and fixtures.
Possess strong proficiency in the manufacturing processes of jigs and fixtures, such as assembly, machining, fabrication, and welding.
Analyze tooling failures and evaluate tool characteristics and operational requirements.
Plan factory layouts to optimize space utilization in response to rearrangements, newly implemented processes, or facility expansions.
Assess the need for upgraded facilities and contribute to comprehensive assembly planning.
Develop and implement assembly processes in accordance with CPPD (Concurrent Process and Product Development) and NPI (New Product Introduction) design changes.
Lead the transition of new products from engineering to manufacturing seamlessly.
Employ creative problem-solving strategies to address operational challenges, including ergonomics, safety improvements, process efficiency, bottlenecks, and quality issues.
Manage projects to ensure the implementation of efficient and cost-effective systems that deliver high-quality products.
Coordinate the application, procurement, processing, installation, and capability verification for new equipment.
Provide technical manufacturing support in process control and facilitate internal certification procedures.
Oversee the procurement and integration of machine tools, controls, and related equipment to ensure adoption of the latest technology for increased efficiency and economic operation.
Innovate production methods through the application of lean engineering principles.
Enhance shop floor space utilization for improved operational flow.
Develop APQP process documentation—such as assembly procedures, test protocols, BOMs, process flows, and FMEAs—in collaboration with cross-functional teams.
Implement assembly processes in compliance with Caterpillar standard operating procedures.

Required Qualifications:

Bachelor's Degree in Mechanical Engineering.
8 to 10 years in manufacturing engineering; including NPI experience.
Experience in AI initiatives in manufacturing environment, Internet of Things (IOT) and Industry 4.0 concepts is preferred.
Experience in using Dataiku, Sidekick and other AI Platforms for developing automations to simplify & streamline manufacturing operations.
Hands-on experience in data visualization and analytics tools such as Microsoft Power BI
Strong understanding of:
Manufacturing data structures (MES, ERP, shopfloor signals)
KPI frameworks (OEE, FPY, MTBF, MTTR)
Ability to:
Build dashboards from raw data
Interpret trends and drive decisions
Present insights to cross-functional teams
Tool design experience: Jigs, fixtures, gauges.
Skilled in CREO, SolidWorks, AutoCAD.
Able to manage multiple tasks and priorities.
Demonstrated leadership abilities combined with strong written and verbal communication skills to effectively collaborate both internally and externally across all levels of an organization.
Strong interpersonal skills; effective working independently or in teams.
Skilled in data collection, analysis, root cause investigation, and metrics.
SAP ERP and MES experience preferred.
Advanced Microsoft Office, Teamcenter, and Virtual Build proficiency.
Knowledge of mechanical/electrical manufacturing, assembly, and testing.
Engine assembly experience preferred.
Automotive or engine assembly launch experience.
Experience with Leak Test and Torque Tools.

Desired Qualifications:

Possesses a Master’s degree in Mechanical Engineering or a related discipline.
Demonstrates experience working in complex environments, including but not limited to robotics, automation, special-purpose machinery, material handling, and assembly equipment.
Highly proficient in Lean Manufacturing and Continuous Improvement principles and methodologies.
Exhibits comprehensive knowledge of manufacturing concepts, with a focus on engine assembly, engine testing, and painting processes.
Experience in:
Integrating Power BI with MES / SAP / IoT platforms
Creating real-time or near real-time dashboards
Using data models for predictive insights (not just reporting)

Additional Info:

Office Model: This position requires the employee to work a 5-day-a-week schedule in the office.

This Job Description is intended as a general guide to the job duties for this position and is intended for the purpose of establishing the specific salary grade. It is not designed to contain or be interpreted as an exhaustive summary of all responsibilities, duties and effort required of employees assigned to this job. At the discretion of management, this description may be changed at any time to address the evolving needs of the organization. It is expressly not intended to be a comprehensive list of “essential job functions” as that term is defined by the Americans with Disabilities Act.

title: MATERIAL PLANNING ANALYST
description:
DESCRIPTION

Career Area:

Supply Chain and Logistics

Job Description:

Your Work Shapes the World at Caterpillar Inc.

When you join Caterpillar, you're joining a global team who cares not just about the work we do – but also about each other. We are the makers, problem solvers, and future world builders who are creating stronger, more sustainable communities. We don't just talk about progress and innovation here – we make it happen, with our customers, where we work and live. Together, we are building a better world, so we can all enjoy living in it.

Role Definition
Schedules, plans and oversees material procurement, production and delivery processes.

Responsibilities
• Participates in scheduling production and delivery processes in accordance with current productivity and cost efficiency standards.
• Develops and executes material planning for a product line to ensure that all material requirements for assigned programs are met within the allocated time frame.
• Organizes the flow of materials within the manufacturing unit and the transferring of materials to and from the inventory or warehouse.
• Generates forecasts and manages replenishment planning for parts and materials to ensure specified service levels are met.

Degree Requirement
Degree or equivalent experience desired

Skill Descriptors
Decision Making and Critical Thinking: Knowledge of the decision-making process and associated tools and techniques; ability to accurately analyze situations and reach productive decisions based on informed judgment.
Level Working Knowledge:
• Applies an assigned technique for critical thinking in a decision-making process.
• Identifies, obtains, and organizes relevant data and ideas.
• Participates in documenting data, ideas, players, stakeholders, and processes.
• Recognizes, clarifies, and prioritizes concerns.
• Assists in assessing risks, benefits and consideration of alternatives.

Distribution Requirements Planning (DRP): Knowledge of the process, issues and considerations for systematically managing distribution of inventory for multiple plants or warehouses; ability to apply related knowledge and experience in real practice.
Level Working Knowledge:
• Works with real-time inventory software, moving supplies to where needed, when needed.
• Interprets the impact of bottlenecks and delays on operating costs.
• Follows processes and applies technologies for items and inventory management.
• Assists in solving issues related to distribution to meet orders or inventory replenishment requirements.
• Works with basic distribution requirements planning (DRP) processes and operations.

Internal Resource Coordination: Knowledge of the techniques, tools and applications associated with coordination of internal resources; ability to synchronize and integrate activities, responsibilities, and command and control structures to ensure that internal resources are used most efficiently in pursuit of business objectives.
Level Basic Understanding:
• Identifies basic characteristics of good business relationships or partnerships.
• Attends training to learn coordination skills with individuals and groups.
• Lists major techniques, tools and approaches for resource coordination.
• Describes the organization's culture and policies for coordinating with others.

Manufacturing Requirements Planning (MRP): Knowledge of the processes, practices and systems used in manufacturing requirements planning (MRP); ability to optimize planning for manufacturing cycles and ensure capacity and materials availability.
Level Basic Understanding:
• Describes basic concepts of materials and capacity management processes and procedures.
• Describes product life cycle and associated MRP cycle.
• Identifies parameters and considerations used in making decisions about production runs.
• Describes the use of bills of materials and other documentation needed to provide supplies.

Materials Handling and Management: Knowledge of material handling and management in plants; ability to perform, monitor and improve processes related to storage, transportation and handling of raw and hazardous materials.
Level Basic Understanding:
• Identifies key issues involved with different types of manufacturing materials.
• Discusses considerations for physical management of major types of materials.
• Identifies types of materials used in manufacturing flagship products or components.
• Describes packaging regulations and locates those specific to the requirements of the situation.

Planning and Organizing: Knowledge of the process of planning and arranging tasks and resources; ability to plan and organize both time and resources to get things completed while structuring and maintaining work in a systematic and highly methodical way.
Level Basic Understanding:
• Seeks help to modify priorities as new information surfaces or conditions change.
• Demonstrates the ability to estimate the time and resources required to complete tasks.
• Identifies own key assignments, schedules, and process steps.
• Applies the concept of 'critical path' in order to complete work in a timely manner and keep larger tasks on track.

Problem Solving: Knowledge of approaches, tools, techniques for recognizing, anticipating, and resolving organizational, operational or process problems; ability to apply knowledge of problem solving appropriately to diverse situations.
Level Basic Understanding:
• Explains the value of a disciplined approach to problem solving.
• Describes problem reporting and escalation practices.
• Utilizes accepted procedures for problem analysis and resolution.
• Identifies key aspects of problem-solving techniques used in own area.

Relationship Management: Knowledge of relationship management techniques; ability to establish and maintain healthy working relationships with clients, vendors, and peers.
Level Basic Understanding:
• Provides examples of the characteristics of effective business relationships.
• Identifies key business relationships in own organization.
• Describes the nature of a productive business relationship.
• Explains the benefits of building business partnerships.

This Job Description is intended as a general guide to the job duties for this position and is intended for the purpose of establishing the specific salary grade. It is not designed to contain or be interpreted as an exhaustive summary of all responsibilities, duties and effort required of employees assigned to this job. At the discretion of management, this description may be changed at any time to address the evolving needs of the organization.

Additional information: This job required 5days working from office.

description:
DESCRIPTION

Career Area:

Business Services

Job Description:

Your Work Shapes the World at Caterpillar Inc.

When you join Caterpillar, you're joining a global team who cares not just about the work we do – but also about each other. We are the makers, problem solvers, and future world builders who are creating stronger, more sustainable communities. We don't just talk about progress and innovation here – we make it happen, with our customers, where we work and live. Together, we are building a better world, so we can all enjoy living in it.

Nature of On-the-Job Training – Production Trainee (NAPS / Company Trainee)

Work under basic supervision to assemble and test machine parts, components, and systems as per production requirements.
Operate one or more machines on the shop floor following safety and quality standards.
Support painting and finishing activities for machine parts or components when assigned.
Work in a shop-floor environment, involving 8–9 hours of standing work each day.
Training activities may require lifting and carrying materials up to 8 kg as part of regular tasks.

Eligibility: Candidates who have completed their Diploma course.

Kickstart your career with Caterpillar’s NAPS & Company Trainee Program — Gain hands‑on skills, industry exposure, and the chance to build what matters. ​

Introduction to Caterpillar BCP: Join Caterpillar and seize the opportunity to experience one of our esteemed manufacturing set up team as a NAPS / Trainee within the Building & Construction Products division in Thiruvallur, Tamil Nadu. In this pivotal role you will work for assembling backhoe loader, skid steer loader and support new project requirements in the shop floor.

Introduction to NAPS: In an endeavor to promote apprenticeship in India, National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme (NAPS) has been launched by the Government in August 2016. The scheme entails financial support to establishments undertaking apprenticeship programs.

Your Work Shapes the World at Caterpillar Inc.

When you join Caterpillar, you're joining a global team who cares not just about the work we do – but also about each other. We are the makers, problem solvers, and future world builders who are creating stronger, more sustainable communities. We are seeking a highly skilled Senior Software Engineer with exceptional expertise in SQL and hands-on experience with at least one major cloud platform (AWS, Azure, or GCP). The ideal candidate is a strong problem solver with excellent communication skills and a passion for building scalable, reliable systems. Experience with Python and Hightouch is a strong plus.

Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand requirements and translate them into technical solutions.

Hands-on experience with at least one cloud provider: AWS, Azure, or GCP.
Strong experience in backend engineering, data engineering, or platform engineering.
Solid understanding of distributed systems, APIs, and application design principles.
Excellent communication skills—capable of explaining complex technical topics clearly.
Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities with a proactive mindset.
